# Changelog

## 0.1.0 (2026-05-16)


### Features

* add options for parsing commit hash values ([#2](https://github.com/aj3sh/cocox/issues/2)) ([99e8c70](https://github.com/aj3sh/cocox/commit/99e8c70dbd5614b864cd870fb4ce696ab7ca5234))
* commit check with message and file argument ([5871640](https://github.com/aj3sh/cocox/commit/5871640c0790638c185cdcaa998c40bf44824dd2))
* ignore autogenerated commit messages ([#4](https://github.com/aj3sh/cocox/issues/4)) ([6bc6f0e](https://github.com/aj3sh/cocox/commit/6bc6f0e0003ba634c5ea3775da6c11f85f5a37f3))
